notes: Default LoadOut mil reticle. Clean mil cross with 0.5-mil hashes horizontal +/-5 / vertical +/-10, numbered every 2 mil, simple diamond holdover at 2/4/6/8 mil drops. Original LoadOut design.
Compact LoadOut mil reticle. 1-mil hashes horizontal +/-4 / vertical +/-8, three holdover dots below at 2/4/6 mil. For shooters who prefer a minimal field-of-view footprint.

Medium-density LoadOut mil reticle. 0.5-mil hashes horizontal +/-8 / vertical +/-10 with numbered labels every 2 mil and a 0.5-mil-wide holdover ladder at 2/4/6/8 mil drops with faint per-mil intermediate marks.
Dense LoadOut mil reticle. 0.2-mil hashes horizontal +/-10 / vertical +/-12 with numbered labels every 2 mil and a symmetrical diamond holdover ladder at 2/4/6/8/10 mil with 1-mil-wide spread.

Very dense LoadOut Christmas-tree mil reticle. 0.5-mil hashes horizontal +/-10 / vertical +/-15 with numbered labels every 2 mil and a wrapping holdover ladder that widens with drop (1 mil at drop 2, 5 mil at drop 10+) plus wind dots at every 0.5 mil.
Clean LoadOut mil hash reticle. Mil cross + 0.5-mil hashes +/-5 mil on each axis with numbered labels every 1 mil. No holdover tree.
Default LoadOut MOA reticle. 1-MOA hashes horizontal +/-15 / vertical +/-30 with numbered labels every 5 MOA and a diamond holdover ladder at 5/10/15/20 MOA drops.
Compact LoadOut MOA reticle. 1-MOA hashes horizontal +/-10 / vertical +/-20 with minimal holdover dots at 5/10/15 MOA.
Medium-density LoadOut MOA reticle. 0.5-MOA hashes horizontal +/-20 / vertical +/-30 with numbered labels every 5 MOA.
Dense LoadOut MOA reticle. 0.5-MOA hashes horizontal +/-25 / vertical +/-40 with a Christmas-tree wind-dot ladder.
Very dense LoadOut Christmas-tree MOA reticle. 1-MOA hashes horizontal +/-25 / vertical +/-50 with extensive holdover ladder + wind dots.
Clean LoadOut MOA hash reticle. MOA cross + 1-MOA hashes +/-15 MOA on each axis with numbered labels every 5 MOA. No holdover tree.
Second-focal-plane LoadOut mil reticle with calibrated drops at 1/2/3/4/5 mil. Subtensions only true at the spec magnification.
Second-focal-plane LoadOut MOA reticle with calibrated drops every 5 MOA. Subtensions only true at the spec magnification.
LoadOut calibrated drop reticle: crosshair + 5 numbered holdover dots labeled by yardage (200 / 300 / 400 / 500 / 600 yd), thin wind hashes.
LoadOut combat reticle: wide horseshoe (180-deg arc) at center plus a small center dot and four holdover dots below. Designed for fast acquisition on close to mid-range targets.
LoadOut combat-with-BDC reticle: horseshoe + dot + range-estimation BDC marks below + lateral wind dots.
LoadOut designated-marksman reticle: horseshoe at center, wide BDC ladder labeled by yardage out to 800 yd, wind dots at multiple drop ranges.
LoadOut hunting reticle: thin inner plex with calibrated holdover dots at 200 / 300 / 400 yd typical hunting holds, heavy outer plex posts.
Single 2-MOA filled dot. The default red-dot pattern.
Single 4-MOA filled dot.
Single 6-MOA filled dot.
2-MOA filled center dot inside a 32-MOA outer ring (open).
1-MOA center dot with a 65-MOA broken outer ring (segmented arcs).
Original USMC mil-dot pattern (public domain). Mil cross + 0.75-MOA dots at every mil out to 4 mil per side.
Generic mil hash pattern with 1-mil hashes +/-5 mil per axis. Public domain.
Classic four-quadrant plex hunting reticle: thick outer posts taper to a thin center crosshair. Public domain.
Pure 4-line crosshair with thin lines. Public domain.
Pure 4-line crosshair with medium-weight lines. Public domain.
Pure 4-line crosshair with thick lines. Public domain.
German #1: heavy three-post pattern (left, right, bottom posts; no top post). Pre-WW2 European hunting reticle, public domain.
German #4: three heavy posts with thin upper crosshair. Public domain.
German #4A: German #4 layout with a center dot for precision aiming. Public domain.
German #8: heavier post-and-cross pattern with thicker side posts. Public domain.
Pre-WW2 military post-and-crosshair. Thick lower post + thin horizontal/upper crosshair. Public domain.
Old hunting picket-post reticle: thick rising post + thin horizontal. Public domain.
Outer ring with center dot. Generic close-quarters pattern, public domain.
Outer ring with thin crosshair inside. Public domain.
Single inverted-V chevron at center with light reference crosshair. Public-domain pattern (not the trademarked variant from any specific vendor).
Plain crosshair with reference dots placed at regular intervals. Public domain.
Generic front-sight-ring + post simulation: outer ring with central post. Public domain.
Single rising post + reference dot at the aim point. Public domain.
Pure diamond outline at the center, no crosshair. Public domain.
